==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Koryeo]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.

==Ace Agent==
'''Rewards:''' Lottery Ticket +3, 5k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Get all Koryeo INTEL
|Obtain all 39 Koryeo INTEL tiles
|-
|Master all Agent Training
|Obtain all 47 Agent Training tiles
|}

==Demon God's Minions==
'''Rewards:''' Travel Speedup +4h, 5k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Approximate Strength
|-
|Conquer Jejo
|Defeat Gvent Guru within 2 rounds
|41k power
|-
|Conquer N. Seaul
|Defeat Mutant Hairsnake within 2 rounds
|58k power
|-
|Conquer Kanghwa
|Defeat Exterminator within 2 rounds
|90k power
|}

==Koryeo Shopping Cart==
'''Rewards:''' 600 W-tads, 5k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Redeem all limited cards(white)
|Exchange all 10 white card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (green)
|Exchange all 11 green card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (blue)
|Exchange all 11 blue card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (purple)
|Exchange all 9 purple card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (orange)
|Exchange all 7 orange card items
|}

==Koryeo Treasure==
'''Rewards:''' Koryeo Treasure Map +50, Green Reagent +150
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items found
!Rewards
|-
|Idol Fortune Bag (Southern Seaul)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}
|-
|Classic Snack Box (Souther Seaul)
|3
|[?] +20
|-
|Bell of Alojaya (Gyeonkiddo)
|1
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Bell of Alojaya|green}}
|-
|Sepsung Phone (Gyeonkiddo)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Sepsung Phone|green}}
|-
|Demon God Offering (Gyeonkiddo)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}
|-
|Snowman's Gift (Kangwon Do)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}
|-
|Olympics Souvenir (Kangwon Do)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Cilla Tomb Offering (Chungnam)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest, +60}}
|-
|Club Supplies (Chungnam)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}
|-
|Bekje Tomb Offering (Gyeongsang)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +20|blue}}
|-
|Archaeology Supplies (Gyeongsan)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +10|blue}}
|-
|Border Supplies (Encheon)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|War Reserves (Encheon)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +500}}
|-
|Biochem Petri Dish (Pusan)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +1h}}
|-
|Experiment Supplies (Pusan)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Gambler's Collection (Jejo Island)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +1|orange}}
|-
|Shipwreck Treasure (Jejo Island)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Universal Key, +1}}
|-
|Koryeo Tomb Offering (Northern Seaul)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Giant Cell (Northern Seaul)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|King Dangun Tomb Offering (Kanghwa)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Traveler Supplies (Kanghwa)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +3k}}
|}

==Warmonger's Gun==
'''Reward:''' Glue +150, Travel Speedup +2h

See [[Gear]] for more.
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Fuse [[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Switchblade</span>]]
|-
|Fuse [[Gear|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Assault Rifle Model 98</span>]]
|-
|Fuse [[Gear|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Golden Assault Rifle</span>]]
|-
|Fuse [[Gear|<span style="color:#ffb066;">Jung-geun's Gun</span>]]
|-
|Fuse [[Gear|<span style="color:#f66;">Warmonger's Gun</span>]]
|}

==Perfect Kimchi==
'''Reward:''' Green Reagent +60, Spicy Cabbage (Food +20) +50, partner [[Kim Chi-yum]] 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Kimchi MSG (Souther Seaul)
|30 CIV
|Kimchi MSG, 50 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Kimchi Preservative (Kangwon Do)
|150 ART
|Kimchi Preservative, Travel Speedup +10m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Kim Chi-yum (Gyeonkiddo)
|80 TECH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Annals of Joseon, Frag +3}}, Glue +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Secret Contact==
'''Reward:''' Koryeo Treasure Map +30, 5k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Miner's Letter (Gyeonkiddo)
|170 TECH
|?, Stone +200, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Gangster's Letter (Chungnam)
|280 FAME
|?, Soul of ?, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Murikan Soldier's Letter (Encheon)
|350 ART
|?, Koryeo INTEL +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Crime Scene==
'''Reward:''' Travel Speedup +4h, 8k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Pyramid Seller's Fprint (Sothern Seaul)
|430 CIV
|Pyramid Seller's Fingerprint, 50 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Fraudster's Fingerprint (Gyeonkiddo)
|490 TECH
|Fraudster's Fingerprint, Travel Speedup +10m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Godpapa's Suitcase (Chungnam)
|400 TECH
|Godpapa's Fingerprint, Glue +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Gambler's Fingerprint (Jejo Island)
|700 ART
|Gambler's Fingerprint, 120 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Cilla Treasure Map==
'''Rewards:''' [[Incense]] +1, Koryeo Treasure Map +80, [[Prince Nerd's Soul]] partner
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|King Muyeol's Token (Chungnam)
|Unlock [[Koryeo INTEL]] "Cilla Treasure Map" Lv. 1<br>1080 CIV
|King Muyeol's Token, Green Reagent +120, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|King Seondeok's Token (Encheon)
|Unlock [[Koryeo INTEL]] "Cilla Treasure Map" Lv. 2<br>830 TECH
|King Seondeok's Token, Blue Reagent +60, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Prince Nerd's Soul (Kangwha)
|Unlock [[Koryeo INTEL]] "Cilla Treasure Map" Lv. 3<br>[[Chichikaka]] as a full partner
|150 W-tads, Novice Scroll +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Demon God Offering==
'''Rewards:''' Blue Reagent +30, Offering Speedup +4h
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Soldier's Offering (Encheon)
|
|
|-
|Lich's Offering (Pusan)
|
|
|-
|Monster's Offering (Northern Seaul)
|
|
|-
|Follower's Offering (Kanghwa)
|
|
|}

==Demon God's Ball==
'''Rewards:''' Lottery Ticket +3, 20k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Paparazzo (Southern Seaul)
|350 FAME
|Papparazzo's Invitation, Soul of Papparazzo, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Infected Officer's Invitation (Pusan)
|620 FAME
|Infected Officer's Invitation, Soul of Infected Officer, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Gambling God's Invitation (Jejo Island)
|800 TECH
|Gambling God's Invitation, Koryeo INTEL +2000, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Scientist's Invitation (Northern Seaul)
|900 FAME
|Scientist's Invitation, Soul of Scientist, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Robot's Invitation (Kanghwa)
|1400 CIV
|Robot's Invitation, 150 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Super Bio Weapon==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +4h, [[Chichikaka]] partner
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Undead Creature Sample (Gyeongsang)
|450 FAME
|Undead Creature Sample<br>Soul of Undead Creature<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Military Supplies (Encheon)
|530 CIV
|Supersoldier Sample<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +500<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Stinky Storage Box (Pusan)
|580 CIV
|Pusan Zombie's Sample<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +150<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Chichikaka (Kangwon Do)
|[[Kim Chi-yum]] as a full partner
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +50
|}

==Ancestral Blessing==
'''Rewards:''' Hun Min Jong Um +20, Koryeo Treasure Map +100
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|King Dangun's Blessing (Kangwon Do)
|Koryeo Museum FTH >40
|King Dangun's Blessing, 100 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Bekje King's Blessing (Chungnam)
|Koryeo Museum FAME >45
|Bekje King's Blessing, 100 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Cilla King's Blessing (Gyeonsang)
|Koryeo Museum CIV >50
|Cilla King's Blessing, 100 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Koryeo King's Blessing (Northern Seaul)
|Koryeo Museum ART >60
|Koryeo King's Blessing, 100 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Koryeo Tourism Promotion==
Rewards: Koryeo Treasure Map +50, Ad Chest +60
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Rewards
|-
|Watch a fried chicken ad (Gyeongsang)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|Watch a kimchi ad (Pusan)
|Ad Chest +10, Glue +20
|-
|Watch a barbecue ad (Jejo Island)
|Ad Chest +10, 2k B-tads
|-
|Watch a plastic surgery ad (Northern Seaul)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|}
[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Koryeo]]
